title: thelypteris grunowii
intro: Thelypteris grunowii, also known as the Grunow's fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris grunowii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
